_source: RECORDED from the cook pure logic (splitSteps / segmentStep / detectStepAction / matchStepIngredients), run 2026-07-22 — NOT invented. Garlic-butter-chicken instructions (same golden recipe as nutrition.json). Values are the exact function outputs the CookScreen renders; the journey asserts the on-screen text equals them.

rawSteps: Season the chicken breast on both sides with salt, pepper and paprika.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the chicken and sear undisturbed for 4-5 minutes per side until golden brown and cooked through, then lower the heat.
Add the butter and minced garlic to the pan and cook 1 minute until fragrant.
Finish with lemon juice and chopped fresh parsley, then serve.
